title: 'x' values not uniformly exported to JSON in init values for memories

features.name: memory initialization with unknown 'x' values
features.description: Code should include a memory (unpacked array) with multi-bit elements initialized to values containing 'x' bits in an initial block

features.name: for loop initialization of memory with 'x' values
features.description: Code should include a for loop that iterates through all memory entries to initialize them with values containing 'x' bits
